reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, personal carente de modales, cuando uno les marca que cobran mal de malas maneras cancelan la operación, la calidad de los productos pésima,  los cafes quemados,  por le precio que cobran podrían brindar una atención adecuada y productos de calidad. Mil vueltas para cambiarme un producto asqueroso que me entregaron

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, rude staff. When you point out they're overcharging you, they rudely cancel the transaction. The product quality is awful; the coffee was burnt. For the price they charge, they should provide decent service and quality products. It took ages to get me to exchange a disgusting product they gave me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwMHRTVTdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Me pereció qué no está preparada para tanta gente en ciertas fechas. El shop es bastante pequeño, un poco desorganizado y ya casi no tenian nada para comer. Los empleados la remaban a pesar del malhumor de la gente.

(Translated by Google)
It seemed to me that it wasn't prepared for so many people on certain dates. The shop is quite small, a bit disorganized, and they were almost out of food. The employees were doing their best despite the customers' bad moods.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwN0t2UTVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena parada para el viajero. Muy completa y dispone de una pequeña plaza de juegos para niños y un hermoso espacio arbolado para caminar y estirar las piernas. Super agradable. Todos muy amables en la full así como también los playeros .

(Translated by Google)
A great stop for travelers. Very well-equipped, with a small children's playground and a lovely wooded area for walking and stretching your legs. Super pleasant. Everyone at the rest stop was very friendly, as were the beach attendants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwak9QcndnRRAB
